description_long: This triumphal arch is a monumental structure composed of two robust pillars supporting a horizontal entablature, forming a single central archway. The pillars are adorned with intricate geometric patterns and stylized reliefs, while the upper sections feature sculpted animal heads and crystalline formations, lending a fantastical or mythological character. The entablature is decorated with a large, circular medallion at the center, flanked by symmetrical decorative motifs and additional crystal-like elements. The color palette is dominated by earthy browns and greens, with accents of pale blue from the crystal decorations. Moss or lichen details are visible, suggesting age and integration with nature. The overall design blends ancient monumental architecture with fantasy elements, making it a striking landmark in any urban setting.
description: A grand triumphal arch with ornate pillars, animal head sculptures, and crystal decorations, blending ancient and fantastical styles. Earthy tones and mossy details give it an aged, mystical appearance.
description_view_0: The side view reveals the depth of the arch, highlighting the protruding crystal decorations and the layered structure of the pillars.
description_view_1: The front view showcases the central archway, detailed animal head sculptures, geometric reliefs, and the prominent circular medallion at the top.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors the first, displaying the rear depth, crystal elements, and the layered architectural features.
description_view_3: The rear view presents the back of the arch, with a less ornate medallion and similar pillar decorations, but fewer visible reliefs.
